title: Energy markets rally as risk of disruptions rise
section_path: Energy markets rally as risk of disruptions rise
section_path_text: Energy markets rally as risk of disruptions rise
summary:
Main
By Daniel Hynes
An escalation in Europe's energy crisis saw commodity markets gain as the focus returned to supply side issues. Some relief from selling was also found from a halt to the recent rally in the USD. European natural gas rallied as risks to further supply disruptions rattled an already fragile market.
